name: Waimea Valley Falls
tagline: The only place on Oahu where you can legally swim beneath a waterfall — botanical garden walk to boot.
bestTime: Weekday mornings for fewest crowds; after rain for a fuller waterfall
kamaaina: Kamaaina rate ~$16/adult with valid Hawaii ID (vs $26 regular)
talkStory: Admission is $26/adult, $14/child (4-12). The paved path to the falls is fully stroller-friendly — about 0.75 miles each way through a lush botanical garden. Life vests are provided free for swimming at the falls (required). Bring water shoes for the rocky pool bottom. The garden itself has over 5,000 species of tropical plants. Combine with Waimea Bay across the street for a full North Shore day.
